description_long: This is a futuristic, red motorcycle with a streamlined, aerodynamic body and enclosed wheels, reminiscent of the iconic bike from the anime Akira. The body features prominent branding decals, including 'Canon' and other logos, as well as a yellow 'BIG' sticker on one side. The motorcycle has a low, elongated profile with a single seat, integrated handlebars, and a digital dashboard display. The wheels are partially covered by the bodywork, giving it a high-tech, sci-fi appearance. The surface is mostly smooth and glossy, with some visible wear and scuff marks, especially on the rear wheel cover. The overall design suggests high speed and advanced technology, suitable for urban environments or futuristic cityscapes.
description: A sleek, red, futuristic motorcycle with enclosed wheels, prominent decals, and a streamlined, high-tech design. The body is glossy and features branding and wear marks, evoking a sci-fi aesthetic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'Canon' logo, multiple decals, and the full length of the streamlined red body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, aerodynamic nose, digital dashboard, and enclosed front wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a large yellow 'BIG' sticker, additional decals, and visible wear on the rear wheel cover.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the wide rear tire, tail section, and the symmetry of the bodywork.
